headline: AEGIS Hedging to Be Acquired by Private Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives
summary: THE WOODLANDS, Texas, July 22, 2026--AEGIS Hedging Solutions ("AEGIS" or the "Company"), a leading provider of commodity market intelligence, technology, and market infrastructure, today announced it has entered into a definitive transaction agreement with Private Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives. Goldman Sachs Alternatives succeeds Greenbelt Capital Partners and Baird Capital as the Company's institutional investment partner. Financial terms were not disclosed.
